caption: A person with a headset and dark clothing is visible in a small video call window on the right side of a computer screen. The main display shows a complex digital mind map or conceptual diagram against a black background. This network consists of various circular icons containing images, connected by curved blue and green lines. Some icons are labeled with text, including "Insights," "Understanding," and "Flexible Thinking." The browser window at the top displays multiple tabs, with titles such as "Trust & Learning by Symphony," "Future of Society by Symphony," and "Rural Community Food System." Between the frames, the scene remains largely static, though the person in the video call window shifts their head slightly and adjusts their expression, while the digital map stays centered on the screen.
